name: Inline Language Toolkit
description: Inline cloze practice plus vocab sentence collection and review.

open_vocab_lookup.description: Open selected vocab term in WordReference and Linguee

save_selected_sentence.description: Save selected sentence for the current vocab term

capture_sentence_by_hover.description: Highlight the sentence under your cursor, click to capture it (remap in chrome://extensions/shortcuts if it clashes with another extension)
